title: CUB Banking Reimagined
subtitle: Zero-to-one mobile banking for India's evolving financial needs.
problem_statement: CUB's current mobile experience lacks personalization, proactive financial guidance, and a truly native, frictionless user journey.

pillars.title: Trust & Security
pillars.insight: Users demand absolute security and reliability for their financial assets.

pillars.title: Clarity & Simplicity
pillars.insight: Complex financial data must be presented simply and understandably.

pillars.title: Control & Efficiency
pillars.insight: Users seek instant, effortless management of their funds.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we create a hyper-personalized financial wellness platform?
How might users feel empowered managing their finances daily?
How might we integrate AI-driven insights for proactive financial health?

points.name: HDFC Bank
points.desc: Established, traditional banking with broad reach.

points.name: ICICI Bank
points.desc: Modernizing, broad product portfolio, digital focus.

points.name: Paytm PB
points.desc: Digital-first, strong in payments, integrated ecosystem.

points.name: CUB (Current)
points.desc: Functional, traditional banking, basic digital features.

solution.name: CUB NextGen
solution.desc: High innovation, high trust, personalized financial wellness.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to grow my savings.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional, earns well, wants to invest wisely, track expenses.

personas.name: Priya Patel
personas.quote: Managing business and personal finances is tough.
personas.bio: Busy entrepreneur, needs efficient banking for business and family finances.

points.action: Replace generic 'Pay' with context-aware payment options.
Integrate spending insights with personalized budgeting tools.
points.benefit: Offers holistic financial view, better control.

points.action: Adapt UPI QR scan for bill payments and merchant services.
Modify account view to show personalized financial goals.

pivot.before: Generic banking features, reactive transaction management, web-view friction.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from transactional to a proactive, AI-driven financial wellness ecosystem, deeply integrated and native.
pivot.after: Personalized financial coach, intelligent insights, seamless native experience.

annotations.title: Smart Insights
annotations.rationale: Proactively shows spending patterns, savings tips, and financial health.

annotations.title: Contextual Pay
annotations.rationale: Offers UPI/IMPS/NEFT options directly based on recipient.

annotations.title: Goal Tracker
annotations.rationale: Visualizes savings progress towards user-defined financial goals.

data.finding: Cookie banner obscures content, requires immediate user action.
'Daily Expense' label is ambiguous for an account type.
Generic 'Pay' button could lead to wrong transfers.
'A+' icon for text size adjustment is good.
